TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sapaiyu,sapayu, title = sapaiyu,sapayu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sapaiyu,sapayu} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == sapaiyu, sapayu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :藥 nu Amilika :drug nu Zipun :薬物 u canan ku ː sapihica ku ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == sapaiju, sapaju u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :* nu amir~ɾika :drug nu zipun :** u ʦanan ku * sapiħiʦa ku * namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == sapaiyu, sapayu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :藥 nu Amilika :drug nu Zipun :薬物 u canan ku ː sapihica ku ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == sapaiju, sapaju u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :* nu amir~ɾika :drug nu zipun :** u ʦanan ku * sapiħiʦa ku * namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
